headline: Remote's Modern Payroll Platform Surpasses 300% Growth, Fueling Ambitious Next Chapter as the Leading Global Employment Infrastructure
summary: Remote, the global payroll and employment infrastructure platform, announced today that its payroll business has grown more than 300% year over year, with the company surpassing $300M in annual recurring revenue (ARR), and becoming cash-flow positive. With market validation and proven momentum behind it, the company is solidifying its position as the trusted payroll and employment infrastructure for businesses operating across borders.

headline: Did Workday’s Microsoft 365 Copilot Integration Just Redefine WDAY’s Enterprise AI Moat?
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Workday announced that its Sana Self-Service Agent is now available within Microsoft 365 Copilot, allowing employees and managers to handle HR and finance tasks directly in Microsoft 365 while keeping data, approvals, and policies governed in Workday. This integration, alongside Workday’s recent recognition as a Leader in Gartner’s 2026 Magic Quadrant for Talent Acquisition Suites, underlines how deeply its AI capabilities are being embedded into everyday workflows and...
